horoscope: Mercury begins an extended transit of your solar fourth house, dear Aries. During this cycle, which runs until August 9th, you can be quite focused on personal matters, especially family, home, and domestic issues. More than usual, you enjoy discussions and stories about the past or family. You are more rational and objective in your relationships with those close to you, making it a good time to open up discussions. Life is busy and active, at least on a mental level, in your personal environment. There can be more learning or working done at home or with family, for example. It’s a great time to organize your home and draw up long-term plans for getting yourself on solid footing. There can be times during this cycle when you don’t feel well-understood, most often during Mercury's retrograde from June 29th to July 23rd, but it’s a good time for assessing prospects and paying your personal life some due attention. Today and tomorrow, your influence and happiness with friends, groups, or networks can be on your mind. You’re learning, transforming, and growing through your connections.

Mercury heads into your solar third house today, dear Taurus, where it will stay for an extended stay until August 9th, suggesting there's much to learn ahead. It can be more challenging to focus during this cycle, but it's a good time to tackle a variety of subjects and put your feelers out for new ideas or information. As well, learning, talking, writing, or studying can be good ways to handle stress. This transit tends to spark your curiosity and motivate you to reach out, make connections, or dabble with new interests. It can be a time of more than the usual reading, writing, or studying. There can also be a lot of activity and many distractions in your daily affairs at this time. You might enjoy diversifying your interests. Today, you could get the sense that you can put a problem behind you, and you can be quite determined to improve your life.

Mercury begins an extended transit of your solar second house today, dear Gemini, and officially leaves your sign. You’re likely to focus more closely on your practical affairs during this period that lasts until August 9th. You are more rational in your approach to spending, saving, and making money. It's a strong period for analyzing business, money, and practical affairs. At times, you might fret over your finances or go back over decisions, especially during the upcoming retrograde period from June 29th to July 23rd. For the most, however, you’re focusing on building the structures in your life, and it's a pleasant, productive focus. It’s certainly a good time for bringing new ideas, organization, and objectivity to your practical affairs, including your finances. Still, it’s also a strong period for developing your skills and talents, taking special care of your valuables, and acquiring new things that make your life a little easier or more comfortable. It’s a good time to see more clearly what you need and want. Today, you can feel pleasantly ambitious. You’re motivated to improve or bring something to the next level.

Mercury enters your sign today, dear Cancer, and until August 9th, you’re making more executive decisions. You’re more willing to speak your mind and talk about yourself or your personal plans. It’s a time of year when you can most easily use the power of words to attract what you want for yourself. In recent weeks, you may have had fewer opportunities or less desire to speak about yourself or your plans. Now, you’re more independent and mentally connected. You have a stronger impact than usual when you communicate. Mercury will be your guest for longer than usual. Today, intimacy and psychological growth get a boost. Pouring more of your energy into your work, responsibilities, or life path goals comes quite naturally.

Mercury enters your solar twelfth house today, dear Leo, and will visit this area of your solar chart for longer than usual: until August 9th. You're focusing on private matters and past issues during this cycle. You can be searching for meaning in hidden places and examining the past for answers. It's a good time for research, quiet contemplation, and meditation, but don’t let issues that have outgrown their worth in your life drag you down. Examining the past to improve the future is certainly worthwhile, as long as you don’t waste your energy on guilt. You may take more time to make conclusions and decisions during this period. You are more impressionable, but you’re also observing more layers to situations. Discretion may benefit you now. Today, sharing or learning can be particularly satisfying and successful.

Mercury enters your social sector today, dear Virgo, and will visit this house of your solar chart until August 9th. It’s an extended stay, and it’s strong for communicating and exploring new ideas. Friends and networking can be learning experiences in the period ahead. Your ideas are especially unconventional, as you are questioning the rules you typically live by and entertaining new ideas. It’s a time of dreaming up new possibilities and new possible solutions to problems. Social interactions can be a little more frequent, light, and fun during this cycle. You’re giving more thought to personal happiness, perhaps thinking about, or considering reconnecting with, an old friend, or considering clubs or groups that could make your life more interesting. You seek or attract people who stimulate your mind, and people tend to be drawn to you for the same reasons. Today, you're in great shape for your intimate life, work, health, habits, routines, or shared finances.

Mercury begins its transit of your goals and reputation sector today, dear Libra, where it will visit until August 9th. You might seek information and knowledge to enhance your social or career prospects during this cycle. Or you may be giving a lot more thought to your career or life-path goals. It’s a powerful time for developing strategies in your professional life, for career planning, or for thinking in more concrete, ambitious, and practical terms. Watch for doing so much multitasking that it takes you away from what is truly important. It’s a time for thinking things through more often, and for communicating with more awareness of how you’re coming across. There could be more public or professional attention to your ideas. Today, you can experience a pleasant boost for partnering or gaining new perspectives that improve your life.

Mercury begins its visit to your solar ninth house today, dear Scorpio, and will stick around there until August 9th. Transits of Mercury point to current areas of interest, and during this period, you’re more concerned with the bigger picture than the details. Educational, extracurricular, or philosophical subjects might hold more appeal. You are communicating with more persuasiveness, enthusiasm, and optimism during this cycle. The planet of communication will spend more time than usual in this sector of your chart this year due to a retrograde next month. You may be less interested in mundane or routine matters during this cycle, preferring to do overview thinking and goal-setting. Ideas and words tend to flow smoothly now, and you’re looking to expand your knowledge and mental experience. Today, your daily affairs are more rewarding and supportive of your goals. Getting things in smooth working order can be a positive focus.

Mercury begins its transit of your solar eighth house today, dear Sagittarius, where it will visit until August 9th. You may take a stronger interest in all that lies below the surface during this extended stay. Mystery and intrigue appeal to you, and you enjoy uncovering information and analyzing motives. Thinking about shared resources and finances, or negotiations involving them could also figure strongly now. Financial strategy and planning can be especially successful now. It’s a great time to figure things out, think things through, or pick up details that you might otherwise miss. You are more likely to devise strategies and plans rather than take your usual direct route. Small talk doesn’t appeal, while intimate, deep, and profound material does. You are not as concerned with being heard and understood during this cycle as you are interested in understanding the workings of people and situations around you at a deeper level. As a result, you could have some exciting and unusual conversations. Today, you're inclined to throw yourself more deeply into your pursuits. You can feel passionate about a project or a relationship.

Mercury moves into your solar seventh house for an extended stay, dear Capricorn. Until August 9th, you attract more conversation or discussion into your life. Exchanging ideas and feedback are bigger themes in your relationships. You might seek or naturally attract interesting people who stimulate your curiosity and mental abilities. Or, others jumpstart your own thinking processes more frequently. You might often turn to trusted friends or a partner for advice, or at least for a comment, so that you can make your own decisions. You have a strong desire to cooperate and communicate with others, or your own thoughts become clearer through dialogue. Today, you can feel driven to improve your personal or home life, and through these efforts, you feel more confident.

Mercury moves into your solar sixth house today, dear Aquarius, where it will visit until August 9th. This can be a very productive transit! List-making, organizing, and analyzing are satisfying and helpful. Use this energy positively by organizing the important systems in your life, one step at a time. It’s better not to overwhelm yourself with tasks. It’s a strong cycle for activities that help you get your life (or your mind) more organized. There can be a lot of effort and thought put into putting things in order, or your work can involve more communications. Watch for a tendency to fret, worry, and overthink. Health, chores, routines, and wellness programs can be more interesting topics for you now. Today, sharing your ideas, learning, or guiding can be quite pleasant and successful.

Mercury begins its visit to your solar fifth house today, dear Pisces, and will stay there until August 9th. During this cycle, you are proud of your ideas and very good at expressing them. Your thinking is more creative than usual, and you tend to entertain others with your communications. Your sense of humor and mischief is strong. You’re standing out from the crowd on a mental level, with Mercury encouraging your desire to share your observations and ideas with others. You’re more inclined to play games, express yourself more spontaneously or bravely, express your affections, and think about/analyze your love life. You might be seeking more interesting, offbeat ideas, subjects, and perhaps even people. Generally speaking, this can be a mentally fruitful period. Today, you can see more clearly what you truly value, and this can alter your approach to money, home life, and belongings.
